text.title: Certificate Rotation Pipeline (cert-manager / Terraform / Compose) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the config artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required field set to null and other required fields missing.

list.item: issuer_kind: must match enum: ClusterIssuer, Issuer, Terraform-ACM, Terraform-GCP; otherwise reject.
renew_before_days: must match integer 7..60; otherwise reject.
private_key_destination: must match enum: vault, k8s-secret, aws-secrets-manager; otherwise reject.
expiry_alert_days: must match integer 1..14; otherwise reject.
environment_isolation: must match boolean: each env has own issuer; otherwise reject.
apply_path: must match enum: render-scan-apply; otherwise reject.
